author: Aleyda Solís
topic_filter: AI SEO / GEO / LLM SEO / AI content strategy / AI search

posts.text: New 🔥 resource: Google Search Algorithm & AI Search Update Tracker by DemandSphere 👇 with every major Google Search ranking update and AI innovation since 2000. From Florida to AI Mode. Check it out, link in comments 👀

Search as Agent Manager": what Pichai's interview really means for SEO, commerce, and the open web - Excellent summary by Gianluca Fiorelli 👇 Some highlights: 

* The "agent manager" framing is Pichai's new thesis for what Search becomes.
* 2026 is the diffusion year; 2027 is the agentic inflection. He expects 2027 to be "a big year in which some of those shifts happen pretty profoundly." He estimates that today, only about 0.1% of the world "is living this future."
* The non-zero-sum framing is a pre-emptive defense. This is rhetorical scaffolding for investors and regulators who worry that AI Mode cannibalizes the referral traffic that built the open web. 

Much more! Read: https://lnkd.in/eZW3Dujm

🚨 This Week's SEO & AI Search News & Updates [From Today's #SEOFOMO - April 19, 2026] 👇 

* AI Mode becomes stickier with the latest release on Chrome Desktop: when you click a link from AI Mode, the website opens side-by-side. This likely increases time spent inside AI Mode. 

* Google is introducing a new spam policy for "back button hijacking." Don't interfere with a user's ability to navigate their browser history

* Google Search Console Email Glitch Gives SEOs A Scare. It's not supposed to be related to anything else. 

* March 2026 Core Update: Radar, Visibility Analysis and Background. Informational content was impacted negatively. 

* Update Your Google Crawler IP Range Endpoints. If you automatically fetch Google's crawler IP ranges, check it immediately. 

* Prioritize SEO efforts like a pro with THRICE. A useful SEO prioritization framework. 

* How to fix a suspended Google Merchant Center account. A practical step by step guide. 

* The Fan-Out Effect: What Happens Between a Query and a Citation. Retrieval rank is the dominant signal. 

* Why ChatGPT Cites One Page Over Another (Study of 1.4M Prompts). The data also taught them a lesson in analytical caution. 

* LLMs Are Not as Complex as You Think: Here Are 10 Strategies To Improve AI Visibility. How to spot misrepresentation in AI answers and fix it. 

* Much more! Including SEO jobs, tools, events... from SEOs like Lily Ray, Eli Schwartz, chima mmeje🏳️‍🌈, Ryan Siddle, Steve Paine, many more. 

Thanks to today's sponsor Semrush 🙌 Read it all in link in comments. 

Remember to subscribe in seofomo(.)co 💪

🚨 AI Mode becomes stickier with the latest release on Chrome Desktop: when you click a link from AI Mode, the website opens side-by-side. Now users can visit source pages without exiting the "AI search workflow", which likely increases time spent inside AI Mode 👇
🍿 Gemini has now +25% of AI platforms traffic 👇 Google strategy is working well
